segments.text: LINDA: Hello, Linda speaking.
segments.translation: 琳达：你好，我是琳达。

segments.text: MATT: Oh hi, Linda. This is Matt Brooks.
segments.translation: 马特：嗨，琳达。我是马特·布鲁克斯。

segments.text: Alex White gave me your number.
segments.translation: 亚里克斯·怀特给了我你的号码。

segments.text: He said you'd be able to give me some advice about moving to Banford.
segments.translation: 他说你能给我一些关于搬到班福德的建议。

segments.text: LINDA: Yes, Alex did mention you.
segments.translation: 琳达：是的，亚里克斯确实提到过你。

segments.text: How can I help?
segments.translation: 我可以怎么帮忙呢？

segments.text: MATT: Well, first of all - which area to live in?
segments.translation: 马特：好的，首先，你住哪个区域？

segments.text: LINDA: Well, I live in Dalton, which is a really nice suburb - not too expensive, and there's a nice park.
segments.translation: 琳达：嗯，我住在道尔顿，这是一个非常好的郊区，不太贵，而且还有一个漂亮的公园。

segments.text: MATT: Sounds good. Do you know how much it would be to rent a two bedroom flat there?
segments.translation: 马特：听起来不错。你知道在那里租一间有两个卧室的公寓多少钱吗？

segments.text: LINDA: Yeah, you should be able to get something reasonable for 850 pounds per month.
segments.translation: 琳达：是的，你应该能在那找到价格合理的月租850英镑的房间。

segments.text: That's what people typically pay.
segments.translation: 通常人们付的都是这个价。

segments.text: You certainly wouldn't want to pay more than 900 pounds.
segments.translation: 你肯定不想支付超过900英镑吧。

segments.text: That doesn't include bills or anything.
segments.translation: 这不包括账单或任何东西。

segments.text: MATT: No. That sounds alright.
segments.translation: 马特：不。听起来不错

segments.text: I'll definitely have a look there.
segments.translation: 我肯定会去看看那里。

segments.text: Are the transport links easy from where you live?
segments.translation: 你居住的地方的交通方便吗？

segments.text: LINDA: Well, I'm very lucky.
segments.translation: 琳达：嗯，我很幸运。

segments.text: I work in the city centre so I don't have to use public transport.
segments.translation: 我在市中心工作，所以我不是非得使用公共交通工具。

segments.text: I go by bike.
segments.translation: 我骑自行车去。

segments.text: MATT: Oh, I wish I could do that.
segments.translation: 马特：哦，我希望我能那样做。

segments.text: Is it safe to cycle around the city?
segments.translation: 在市里骑车安全吗？

segments.text: LINDA: Yes, it's fine. And it keeps me fit.
segments.translation: 琳达：安全的。骑车让我保持健康。

segments.text: Anyway, driving to work in the city centre would be a nightmare because there's hardly any parking.
segments.translation: 无论如何，因为几乎没有停车位，所以开车到市中心工作将是一场噩梦。

segments.text: And the traffic during the rush hour can be bad.
segments.translation: 而且高峰时段的交通可能会很糟。

segments.text: MATT: I'd be working from home but I'd have to go to London one or two days a week.
segments.translation: 马特：我要在家工作，但我必须每周去伦敦一两天。

segments.text: LINDA: Oh, that's perfect. Getting to London is no problem.
segments.translation: 琳达：哦，那太完美了。去伦敦没问题。

segments.text: There's a fast train every 30 minutes which only takes 45 minutes.
segments.translation: 每30分钟有一趟快速列车，只需45分钟。

segments.text: MATT: That's good.
segments.translation: 马特：那很好。

segments.text: LINDA: Yeah, the train service isn't bad during the week.
segments.translation: 琳达：是的，火车服务在工作日还不差。

segments.text: And they run quite late at night.
segments.translation: 而且它们在晚上运行很晚。

segments.text: It's weekends that are a problem.
segments.translation: 到了周末就是一个问题。

segments.text: They're always doing engineering work and you have to take a bus to Hadham and pick up the train there, which is really slow.
segments.translation: 铁路上总有工程任务，你必须坐公共汽车去哈德姆，然后去那里坐火车，这真的很慢。

segments.text: But other than that, Banford's a great place to live.
segments.translation: 但除此之外，班福德是一个很棒的居住地。

segments.text: I've never been happier.
segments.translation: 我在那住得非常幸福。

segments.text: LINDA: There are some nice restaurants in the city centre and a brand new cinema which has only been open a couple of months.
segments.translation: 琳达：市中心有一个很棒的餐厅，还有一个只开业几个月的新电影院。

segments.text: There's a good arts centre too.
segments.translation: 这里还有一个很好的艺术中心。

segments.text: MATT: Sounds like Banford's got it all.
segments.translation: 马特：听起来班福德简直完美啊。

segments.text: LINDA: Yes! We're really lucky.
segments.translation: 琳达：是的！我们真的很幸运。

segments.text: There are lots of really good aspects to living here.
segments.translation: 居住在这里有很多非常好的优势。

segments.text: The schools are good and the hospital here is one of the best in the country.
segments.translation: 学校很好，并且这里的医院是全国最好的医院之一。

segments.text: Everyone I know who's been there's had a positive experience.
segments.translation: 我认识的每个人都有过很好的居住体验。

segments.text: Oh, I can give you the name of my dentist too in Bridge Street, if you're interested.
segments.translation: 哦，如果你有兴趣的话，我也可以给你在桥街我牙医的名字。

segments.text: I've been going to him for years and I've never had any problems.
segments.translation: 我已经在他那里看了好多年了，从来没有遇到任何问题。

segments.text: MATT: Oh,OK. Thanks!
segments.translation: 马特：哦，好的。谢谢！

segments.text: LINDA: I'll find his number and send it to you.
segments.translation: 琳达：我找到他的号码就发给你。

segments.text: MATT: Thanks, that would be really helpful.
segments.translation: 马特：谢谢，这真的很有帮助。

segments.text: LINDA: Are you planning to visit Banford soon?
segments.translation: 琳达：你打算近期去参观班福德吗？

segments.text: MATT: Yes. My wife and I are both coming next week.
segments.translation: 马特：是的。我和我的妻子下周都要来。

segments.text: We want to make some appointments with estate agents.
segments.translation: 我们想与地产代理商约个时间。

segments.text: LINDA: I could meet you if you like and show you around.
segments.translation: 琳达：如果你愿意，我可以约你并带你四处看看。

segments.text: MATT: Are you sure? We'd really appreciate that.
segments.translation: 马特：真的吗？我们真的很感激。

segments.text: LINDA: Either a Tuesday or Thursday is good for me, after 5.30.
segments.translation: 琳达：周二或周四5：30之后我都可以。

segments.text: MATT: Thursday's preferable - Tuesday I need to get home before 6 pm.
segments.translation: 马特：周四更好，我需要在周二下午6点之前回家。

segments.text: LINDA: OK. Great. Let me know which train you're catching and I'll meet you in the cafe outside.
segments.translation: 琳达：好的。太棒了。让我知道你要坐哪辆火车，我会在外面的咖啡馆等你。

segments.text: You can't miss it.
segments.translation: 你不会错过它的。

segments.text: It's opposite the station and next to the museum.
segments.translation: 它位于车站对面，毗邻博物馆。

segments.text: MATT: Brilliant. I'll text you next week then.
segments.translation: 马特：太棒了。我下周会发短信给你。

segments.text: Thanks so much for all the advice.
segments.translation: 非常感谢你给我所有的建议。

segments.text: LINDA: No problem. I'll see you next week.
segments.translation: 琳达：没问题。下周见。
